{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The output maintains the logical flow and consistency of the original text, but does not walk through every inconsistency end-to-end.",
    "R1.6": "The writing is improved with clearer transitions and reduced redundancy, but some sentences could be more polished.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty about tuning parameters and modeling assumptions is appropriately disclosed, though no explicit confidence levels are given.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers the exact same active set as requested without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors or harmful content were introduced; minor improvements in clarity do not constitute a regression.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with context from the original text."
  },

    "RX.1": 0.7,

  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.2: The output maintains the logical flow and consistency of the original text, but does not walk through every inconsistency end-to-end.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is improved with clearer transitions and reduced redundancy, but some sentences could be more polished.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty about tuning parameters and modeling assumptions is appropriately disclosed, though no explicit confidence levels are given.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers the exact same active set as requested without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced; minor improvements in clarity do not constitute a regression.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with context from the original text.
